title: model_delete(表数据删除)
textarea_values:
- key: role_ldap_group_delete
    module: model_delete
    params:
      role_id_list:
        check:
          template: "{{must .role_id_list}}"
          err_msg: 角色不能为空
    table: "role_ldap_group"
    filter:
      role_id__in: "[role_id_list]"

- key: collect_doc_demo_remove
    module: model_delete
    table: collect_doc_demo
    params:
      demo_list:
        check:
          template: "{{must .demo_list}}"
          err_msg: 示例代码不能为空
    handler_params:
      - key: prop_arr
        foreach: "[demo_list]"
        value: "[doc_demo_id]"
        save_field: doc_demo_id_list
    filter:
      doc_demo_id__in: "[doc_demo_id_list]"
body_text:
model_delete(表数据删除)
